title: replacing podman logo SVG and PNG files
body:
updating podman logo source to have text as paths (which won't require the correct font be installed to display properly) as well as updating PNG to accurately reflect design intent (which will allow for logotype to match other logos in the containers family such as buildah and cri-o)

Addresses #3350

comments.body:
Hi @mairin. Thanks for your PR.

I'm waiting for a [containers](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) or [openshift](https://github.com/orgs/openshift/people) member to verify that this patch is reasonable to test. If it is, they should reply with `/ok-to-test` on its own line. Until that is done, I will not automatically test new commits in this PR, but the usual testing commands by org members will still work. Regular contributors should [join the org](https://github.com/orgs/openshift/people) to skip this step.

Once the patch is verified, the new status will be reflected by the `ok-to-test` label.

I understand the commands that are listed [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>

Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mairin*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@mairin Mind adding a signoff to fix CI? `git commit --amend -s` should do it.
i'm not sure what the vendor test is looking for or what i can do to fix, any advice?
Looks like a network flake... It's trying to verify the existence of a package, but can't connect to its listed repo. Restarting.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3354) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
#3354  from @dankohn was merged just about an hour ago.  Does this replace that or did we have a merge race?
@TomSweeneyRedHat #3354 has the wrong version of the files :( i think it was merged first tho. i tried to rebase to account for it but i'm not very good at git.

@mairin OK, well merging this will fix that up.  Thanks for the clarification.
LGTM assuming happy tests.
I'm not sure why it's failing, is it another network issue?
CI's having issues everywhere. Since it's all Google cloud hosted, I'm blaming whatever outage killed Google Calendar.
